title: Neuritis in Musicians: 8 Teas to the Rescue
description: Boswellia serrata teas have been traditionally used to help with neuritis, a condition characterized by inflammation and pain in the nerves. The key to its effectiveness lies in its anti-inflammatory and anti-arthritic properties, particularly in its ability to inhibit the production of pro-inflammatory compounds called leukotrienes. Boswellia serrata contains boswellic acids, a group of triterpenoids that account for its medicinal properties. These acids have been shown to reduce infl...
